"'''Special Ops: The Art of Infiltration'''" was a short story originally slated to be printed in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 17|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 17]], written by [[John Beyer]] and [[Kathy Burdette]].

Despite rumors, "Special Ops: The Art of Infiltration" was not published in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]], though it has been mistaken for the unrelated ''[[Topside Infiltration]]'' published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]].

==Plot summary==
An [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] team (including [[Morgan Q. Raventhorn]], [[Maglenna Pendower]], and [[Dren Nord]]) fight against [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Edmond Mylesgood]]. The group completes its objective and destroys a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] full of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] troops.
